popularStory.headline: RAWLINS, James - history
popularStory.description: James Rawlins immigrated to America in 1632 with the settlers of Ipswich, Massachusetts.  He did not remain long in Ipswich for he is mentioned by Farmer as being at Newbury in 1634...We next hear of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當James Rawlins II於1613年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親James Rawlins or Rollins Sr28歲，母親Sarah Beach26歲。他和Hannah至少有7個兒子和3個女兒。他於1633年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利且於1644年住在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆聶文頓。他去世於1687年8月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Rawlins II于1613年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲James Rawlins or Rollins Sr28岁，母亲Sarah Beach26岁。他和Hannah至少有7个儿子和3个女儿。他于1633年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利且于1644年住在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆聶文頓。他去世于1687年8月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年74岁。

meanings: English: variant of Rawling , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When James Rawlins II was born in 1613, in Cornwall, England, his father, James Rawlins or Rollins Sr, was 28 and his mother, Sarah Beach, was 26. He had at least 7 sons and 3 daughters with Hannah. He lived in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1633 and Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States in 1644. He died on 13 August 1687, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Rawlins II est né en 1613, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, James Rawlins or Rollins Sr, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sarah Beach, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles avec Hannah. Il a vécu à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1633 et à Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis en 1644. Il est décédé le 13 août 1687, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Rawlins II 1613 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Rawlins or Rollins Sr 28 und seine Mutter Sarah Beach 26. Er hatte mit Hannah mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1633 hat er in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1644 in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 13. August 1687 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Rawlins II è nato il nel 1613 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, James Rawlins or Rollins Sr, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Beach, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie con Hannah. Vissuto a Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1633 e nel Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1644. Morì il 13 agosto 1687, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Rawlins IIが1613年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父James Rawlins or Rollins Srは28歳，母Sarah Beachは26歳であった。彼はHannahとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1633年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーに，1644年にはアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムニューイントンに住んでいた。彼は1687年8月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Rawlins II(이)가 1613년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Rawlins or Rollins Sr(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Beach(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Hannah(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1633년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서, 1644년도에 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 뉴잉턴에서 살았다. 그는 1687년 8월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Rawlins II nasceu em 1613, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Rawlins or Rollins Sr, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Beach, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas com Hannah. Ele viveu em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1633 e em Newington, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América em 1644. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1687, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Rawlins II родился в 1613 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени James Rawlins or Rollins Sr было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Beach, 26. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери от Hannah. Он жил в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1633 году и в местности нюингтон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в 1644 году. Он умер 13 августа 1687 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Rawlins II nació en 1613, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, James Rawlins or Rollins Sr, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sarah Beach, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas con Hannah. Vivió en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1633 y en Newington, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos en 1644. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1687, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años.
